spaces.name: VOLUE – Engineering
spaces.description: Engineering-centric workspace: incidents, changes, projects, automation, design.

lists.name: 01. Inbox
lists.description: Raw intake: notes from calls, ideas, unsorted tasks.

lists.name: 02. Now (This Week)
lists.description: Commitments for the current week.

lists.name: 03. Backlog
lists.description: Accepted tasks that are not in focus this week.

lists.name: Incidents (P1–P3)
lists.description: Real incidents, outages, and major issues.

lists.name: 2nd Line / Escalations
lists.description: Escalated tickets and complex support work.

lists.name: Planned Changes
lists.description: Change work with windows, risk, and rollback plans.

lists.name: Regular Maintenance
lists.description: Recurring ops tasks: patching, checks, housekeeping.

lists.name: Active Projects
lists.description: Larger initiatives and project-level work.

lists.name: Future Projects / Ideas
lists.description: Potential projects and future work candidates.

lists.name: Automation Backlog
lists.description: Ideas for scripts, flows, and tooling to build.

lists.name: Scripts in Development
lists.description: Automation currently being developed or tested.

lists.name: In Production
lists.description: Automation that is running in production environments.

lists.name: Issues / Tech Debt
lists.description: Cleanup, refactors, and technical debt around tools.

lists.name: Design Tasks
lists.description: Work items for solution design and architecture.

lists.name: Decisions & ADRs
lists.description: Architecture decision records and key choices.

lists.name: SOPs / Runbooks – TODO
lists.description: Documentation and runbooks to be created.

lists.name: SOPs Ready
lists.description: Completed SOPs with links to their final location.

lists.name: Reusable Checklists
lists.description: Generic checklists for changes, incidents, etc.

spaces.name: VOLUE – Personal
spaces.description: Personal planning: today, this week, learning, and admin.

lists.name: Today
lists.description: What you actually want to touch today.

lists.name: This Week
lists.description: Personal focus areas and tasks for the week.

lists.name: Learning & Certs
lists.description: Courses, labs, certifications, skill growth.

lists.name: Admin / Company
lists.description: HR/admin tasks, mandatory trainings, etc.
